nasb.text: Gideon made it into an ephod, and placed it in his city, Ophrah, and all Israel played the harlot with it there, so that it became a snare to Gideon and his household.

esv.text: And Gideon made an ephod of it and put it in his city, in Ophrah. And all Israel whored after it there, and it became a snare to Gideon and to his family.

cnv.text: 基甸用這些金子做了一個以弗得，安置在他的城俄弗拉；後來以色列眾人都在那裡隨從以弗得行了邪淫，因此這就成了基甸和他全家的網羅。

ccb.text: 基甸用这些金子造了一件以弗得圣衣，放在自己的家乡俄弗拉。后来，以色列人拜那件以弗得，玷污自己，使基甸及其全家陷入网罗。
